policy.notes: This config is for feasibility probes only. Probe outputs must stay in reports/ until a provider is explicitly approved.

providers.free_tier: 100 requests/hour, 2 bookmakers according to public pricing page
providers.soccer_coverage_claim: football/soccer listed publicly; World Cup 2026 and Asian handicap coverage must be verified
providers.production_gate: Do not enter normalized until a live probe confirms World Cup or international football events plus bookmaker-level 1X2/OU/AH rows.

providers.free_tier: 12 requests/minute, 2 sportsbooks according to public page
providers.soccer_coverage_claim: major club competitions are listed; World Cup/international coverage must be verified
providers.production_gate: Do not enter normalized until a live probe confirms World Cup or international football events and exact line/price structure.

providers.free_tier: public page claims free football REST access; WebSocket is paid
providers.production_gate: Probe must confirm endpoint availability, terms, bookmaker-level rows, and stable event identifiers before any normalized write.
Do not implement until reliable docs and terms are available.

providers.soccer_coverage_claim: site has football odds, but GitHub scrapers are unofficial and fragile
providers.production_gate: Only allowed under data/raw/experimental after legal/ToS review; never publish to public/model runtime by default.

providers.soccer_coverage_claim: site displays football odds, but GitHub projects are reverse-engineered
providers.production_gate: Only allowed under data/raw/experimental after legal/ToS review; never publish to public/model runtime by default.
